message.content:
To determine if the panel is fully visible and working (not blank/white), we analyze the image:  

- The panel displays content: a purple gradient header, user details (name, email), statistical cards (with numbers “6”, “0”, “0”), and a sidebar with menu options.  
- There is no blank/white area obscuring the panel; all elements are rendered and visible.  


Thus, the panel is fully visible and working (not blank/white).  

The answer is Yes
